channel.title: NY on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in NY on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) JEM: Rensselaer County Sheriff’s Office (NY)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Rensselaer County Sheriff’s Office.

Model: JEM Signed: June 10, 2020 County: Rensselaer County State: NY FIPS: 36083

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: AKIMA GLOBAL SERVICES, LLC — ICE GENESEE, NY $27,883,908
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: AKIMA GLOBAL SERVICES, LLC Award ID: 70CDCR23FR0000019 Amount: $27,883,908.48 Description: DETENTION SUPPORT SERVICES FOR ICE DETAINEES AT THE BUFFALO FEDERAL DETENTION FACILITY IN BATAVIA, NY. Period: 2023-02-01 to 2024-01-31 Location: GENESEE, NY (FIPS: 36037)

item.title: GLOBAL TEL*LINK CORPORATION — ICE ORANGE, NY $732,634
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: GLOBAL TEL*LINK CORPORATION Award ID: 70CDCR22P00000026 Amount: $732,633.74 Description: 520 MINUTES OF PRO BONO PHONE CALLS FOR EACH DETAINEE PER MONTH AT ORANGE COUNTY CORRECTIONAL FACILITY, GOSHEN, NEW YORK. Period: 2022-09-26 to 2024-09-25 Location: ORANGE, NY (FIPS: 36071)

item.title: PARAGON PROFESSIONAL SERVICES LLC — ICE NEW YORK, NY $5,902,664
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: PARAGON PROFESSIONAL SERVICES LLC Award ID: 70CDCR25FR0000027 Amount: $5,902,664.00 Description: THIS TASK ORDER IS FOR TRANSPORTATION AND GUARD SERVICES FOR THE ENFORCEMENT AND REMOVAL OPERATIONS, NYC AREA OF RESPONSIBILITY TO ACHIEVE THE ICE MISSION TO SAFELY TRANSPORT DETAINED ALIENS. Period: 2025-04-01 to 2026-03-31 Location: NEW YORK, NY (FIPS: 36061)
